seoTitle: Unisplendour Solutions | Secure Payment, Industrial Control, Smart Grid | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Explore Unisplendour comprehensive solutions including secure payment terminals, industrial FPGA control platforms, and smart metering systems. Authorized distributor with technical support.

solutions.title: Secure Payment Terminal Solution
solutions.subtitle: Bank-grade security for POS and payment devices
solutions.description: Comprehensive secure payment solution based on Unisplendour's THD89 secure microcontroller, providing end-to-end security protection for financial payment terminals with CC EAL6+ certification.
solutions.longDescription:
The Industrial Control Solution 1 from unisplendour represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of unisplendour components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.

Dual-interface support - contact and contactless in one solution
Pre-certified design - reduces time to market significantly

bomList.description: Main security controller with EAL6+ certification

caseStudy.title: Major Bank POS Deployment
caseStudy.description: Successfully deployed in over 500,000 POS terminals across China's major banks
caseStudy.challenge: Replace legacy payment terminals with secure, certified solutions
caseStudy.solution: Deployed THD89-based secure payment terminals with CC EAL6+ certification
results: 30% cost reduction compared to international alternatives

faeInsights.summary: This secure payment solution leverages Unisplendour's THD89 EAL6+ certified security chip to provide bank-grade protection for financial transactions. The decision logic is to prioritize security certification and compliance for payment applications.
faeInsights.decisionLogic: 1. Security First: CC EAL6+ certification is mandatory for banking applications. 2. Dual Interface: Support both contact and contactless for maximum compatibility. 3. Pre-certified: Reduces time-to-market and certification costs. 4. Tamper Protection: Physical security is essential for POS terminals.
faeInsights.keyConsiderations: Certification requirements, interface compatibility, tamper protection level, and time-to-market constraints are the primary factors when selecting this solution.
faeInsights.commonPitfalls: Underestimating certification timeline, insufficient tamper protection design, and inadequate key management infrastructure are common issues to avoid.
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Secure Payment Terminal Solution, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

faqs.question: What certifications does this secure payment solution have?
faqs.answer: The solution is based on THD89 with CC EAL6+ certification, the highest commercial security level. It also meets PCI PTS 6.x, EMVCo, and UnionPay compliance requirements for payment terminals. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Verify specific certification requirements for your target markets. EAL6+ is suitable for all banking applications.

faqs.question: How long does certification typically take?
faqs.answer: Using our pre-certified solution reduces certification time by 50% compared to custom designs. Typical timeline: 6-9 months for EMV certification, 3-6 months for PCI PTS, depending on test lab availability and any required modifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Plan for 6-12 months total certification time. Use pre-certified solution to minimize delays.

faqs.question: What support does BeiLuo provide for payment solution development?
faqs.answer: As an authorized Unisplendour distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive support including reference design review, certification guidance, personalization services, production support, and ongoing technical assistance throughout the product lifecycle.
faqs.decisionGuide: Engage BeiLuo early in the design phase for optimal support. Leverage our certification experience.

faqs.question: Can this solution support both contact and contactless payments?
faqs.answer: Yes, the THD89 supports dual-interface operation with both ISO 7816 contact and ISO 14443 contactless interfaces. This allows a single design to support both payment methods, maximizing compatibility with existing infrastructure.
faqs.decisionGuide: Dual-interface is recommended for new designs to ensure maximum market coverage.

faqs.question: What tamper protection features are included?
faqs.answer: The solution includes comprehensive tamper protection: active shielding mesh, voltage and temperature monitoring, light sensors, intrusion detection, and secure key erasure upon tamper detection. These features meet PCI PTS physical security requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: All tamper features should be enabled for banking applications. Customize based on specific threat models.

faqs.question: How does this solution compare to NXP or Infineon alternatives?
faqs.answer: Our solution offers equivalent EAL6+ security certification at 20-30% lower cost. THD89 provides comparable performance to NXP P71 and Infineon SLE97. The main advantage is local support and supply chain security through BeiLuo as authorized distributor.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate based on total cost of ownership, including support and supply chain considerations.

solutions.longDescription:
The Automotive Electronics Solution 2 from unisplendour represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of unisplendour components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. caseStudy.title: CNC Machine Tool Upgrade
caseStudy.description: Deployed in high-precision CNC machine tools for aerospace component manufacturing
caseStudy.challenge: Upgrade aging CNC controllers with modern, high-performance control systems
caseStudy.solution: Implemented PGT180H-based multi-axis control platform with real-time Ethernet

faeInsights.summary: This industrial control solution leverages Unisplendour's high-performance FPGAs to deliver deterministic real-time control for Industry 4.0 applications. The decision logic prioritizes performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.
faeInsights.decisionLogic: 1. Performance: Select FPGA based on logic capacity and DSP requirements. 2. Reliability: Extended temperature range and industrial-grade components. 3. Protocols: Ensure required industrial Ethernet support. 4. Support: Local FAE assistance for design and debug.
faeInsights.keyConsiderations: Logic capacity, I/O requirements, protocol support, thermal design, and long-term availability are critical factors for industrial applications.
faeInsights.commonPitfalls: Insufficient thermal design, inadequate power supply decoupling, and poor signal integrity planning are common issues in FPGA-based industrial designs.
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Industrial FPGA Control Platform, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

faqs.question: What industrial protocols are supported?
faqs.answer: The solution supports major industrial Ethernet protocols including EtherCAT, PROFINET IO, Modbus TCP, Ethernet/IP, and CC-Link IE. Protocol IP cores are available from Unisplendour and third-party vendors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Verify specific protocol requirements. Most protocols can be implemented in FPGA fabric with appropriate IP cores.

faqs.question: How many motor axes can this solution control?
faqs.answer: The solution can support 4-6 axes of servo control or 8-16 axes of stepper control depending on control algorithm complexity. The PGT180H has sufficient logic and DSP resources for multi-axis synchronized motion control.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate based on axis count and control algorithm requirements. Contact FAE for detailed resource estimation.

faqs.question: What is the temperature range for industrial operation?
faqs.answer: The industrial-grade components support -40°C to +100°C operation. This exceeds typical commercial requirements and ensures reliable operation in harsh industrial environments including outdoor installations and high-temperature factory floors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Verify ambient temperature requirements. Industrial grade recommended for all factory automation applications.

faqs.question: Does BeiLuo provide reference designs for this solution?
faqs.answer: Yes, as an authorized Unisplendour distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive reference designs including schematics, PCB layouts, FPGA reference code, and software drivers. These designs can significantly accelerate your development timeline.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with reference design and customize for specific requirements. Reduces development risk and time.

faqs.question: What development tools are required?
faqs.answer: Development requires Pango Design Suite for FPGA development and standard ARM toolchain for processor software. BeiLuo provides evaluation boards and technical support to help customers get started quickly.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo for evaluation kit and tool licensing information. Training available for new users.

faqs.question: How does this compare to Xilinx or Intel FPGA solutions?
faqs.answer: Unisplendour FPGAs offer comparable performance to Xilinx Zynq and Intel Cyclone at 20-30% lower cost. The main trade-off is ecosystem maturity. For new designs without legacy IP dependencies, Unisplendour provides excellent value with local support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate based on performance requirements, IP availability, and total cost including support.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of unisplendour components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. caseStudy.title: State Grid Smart Meter Deployment
caseStudy.description: Deployed in millions of smart meters for China's State Grid Corporation
caseStudy.challenge: Deploy reliable, accurate smart meters across 20+ provinces with 15-year lifespan
caseStudy.solution: USPM6530-based three-phase meters with AMI communication and tamper detection

faeInsights.summary: This smart metering solution leverages Unisplendour's USPM6530 metering IC to deliver utility-grade accuracy and reliability for smart grid applications. The decision logic prioritizes accuracy, reliability, and smart grid integration.
faeInsights.decisionLogic: 1. Accuracy: Class 0.5S meets utility billing requirements. 2. Reliability: 15-year design life with proven field track record. 3. Integration: Multiple interfaces support various AMI communication options. 4. Tamper Protection: Advanced detection prevents revenue loss.
faeInsights.keyConsiderations: Accuracy class, harmonic analysis requirements, communication protocol, tamper detection features, and calibration procedures are critical factors.
faeInsights.commonPitfalls: Inadequate analog front-end design, poor CT phase compensation, and insufficient isolation are common issues in metering designs.
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Smart Metering & Energy Management, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

faqs.question: What accuracy class does this metering solution achieve?
faqs.answer: The USPM6530 achieves Class 0.5S accuracy for active energy measurement, meeting utility-grade requirements for billing meters. It also supports Class 2.0 for reactive energy. This accuracy is maintained across a 5000:1 dynamic range.
faqs.decisionGuide: 0.5S is suitable for billing applications. Use 0.2S only if specifically required by utility.

faqs.question: What communication interfaces are supported for AMI?
faqs.answer: The solution supports SPI, UART, and I2C interfaces for connecting to communication modules. Popular options include Power Line Communication (PLC), RF mesh networks, and cellular modules. The flexible interface supports various AMI protocols.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select communication technology based on local utility requirements and infrastructure.

faqs.question: What tamper detection features are included?
faqs.answer: Advanced tamper detection includes magnetic field detection, reverse current detection, neutral diversion detection, cover open detection, and voltage imbalance detection. All events are logged with timestamps for forensic analysis.
faqs.decisionGuide: Enable all tamper features for maximum protection. Customize thresholds based on local conditions.

faqs.question: Does this solution support harmonic analysis?
faqs.answer: Yes, the USPM6530 provides harmonic analysis up to the 31st harmonic for both voltage and current. It calculates THD (Total Harmonic Distortion) and individual harmonic magnitudes, enabling comprehensive power quality monitoring.
faqs.decisionGuide: Enable harmonic analysis for industrial and commercial metering applications.

faqs.question: What calibration is required for production?
faqs.answer: Each meter requires individual calibration for gain, phase, and offset. Calibration is performed using reference standards at production. BeiLuo provides calibration equipment recommendations and procedures. Calibration data is stored in EEPROM.
faqs.decisionGuide: Plan for calibration station in production. Use 0.05% or better reference standards.

faqs.question: How does this compare to ADE7758 or STPM32 alternatives?
faqs.answer: USPM6530 offers comparable accuracy to ADE7758 with additional harmonic analysis features. Compared to STPM32, it provides better accuracy (0.5S vs 0.3%) and more flexible interfaces. The main advantage is local support and proven field reliability in millions of deployments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate based on accuracy requirements, feature set, and local support availability.

solutions.name: Consumer Electronics Solution 3

rootFaqs.question: What industries does Unisplendour serve?
rootFaqs.answer: Unisplendour serves a wide range of industries including financial services (secure payment), telecommunications (smart cards), industrial automation, smart grid and energy, automotive electronics, and IoT applications. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo provides specialized support for each industry.
rootFaqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo to discuss your specific industry requirements and solution recommendations.

rootFaqs.question: Does Unisplendour provide reference designs?
rootFaqs.answer: Yes, Unisplendour provides comprehensive reference designs for all major applications including POS terminals, industrial control systems, smart meters, and secure authentication devices. These include schematics, PCB layouts, firmware, and documentation. BeiLuo provides these reference designs as part of our distributor support.
rootFaqs.decisionGuide: Request reference designs early in your development cycle to accelerate time-to-market.

rootFaqs.question: What technical support is available for solution development?
rootFaqs.answer: As an authorized Unisplendour distributor, BeiLuo offers full technical support including application engineering assistance, design reviews, debugging support, and on-site engineering services. Local FAE teams are available to help with your specific application requirements.
rootFaqs.decisionGuide: Engage BeiLuo FAE team early in the design phase for optimal support and guidance.

rootFaqs.question: Are Unisplendour solutions certified for international markets?
rootFaqs.answer: Yes, many Unisplendour solutions carry international certifications including CC EAL6+ for security products, ISO 26262 for automotive applications, and various industry-specific compliance certifications. BeiLuo can provide certification documentation and guidance.
rootFaqs.decisionGuide: Verify specific certification requirements for your target markets with BeiLuo support team.

rootFaqs.question: How can I get started with Unisplendour solutions?
rootFaqs.answer: Contact BeiLuo, an authorized Unisplendour distributor, to discuss your application requirements. We provide evaluation kits, reference designs, and technical documentation to accelerate your development. Our FAE team can guide you through product selection and design implementation.
rootFaqs.decisionGuide: Start with evaluation kit and reference design. Schedule technical consultation with BeiLuo FAE.
